note: Prices include official auction sold values and official retained values when published by IPL sources. 2024 retained values are inferred from previous season contract value when official retained names exist but per-player amount is not published. 2022 draft values for new franchises are included as official non-auction entries. Selected 2022 sold-value normalization gaps are corrected and tagged. Where needed, 2022 values are inferred from official 2023 retained contract values. 2021 retained values are marked unavailable where official per-player values are not accessible. Where available, 2021 gaps are filled from secondary Cricmetric salary records and tagged accordingly. Retained-value gaps are imputed from nearest available real player value and tagged.
